title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLV. Love And Matrimony.
content:
"John, come sell thy fiddle,
            And buy thy wife a gown."
        "No, I'll not sell my fiddle,
            For ne'er a wife in town."
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLV. Love And Matrimony."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
